\chapter{Design}
\label{\detokenize{design/index:design}}\label{\detokenize{design/index::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The design process has been documented quite thoroughly but not all decisions are documented

\sphinxstepscope

\sphinxAtStartPar
Plan for Fountain View Hall


\section{Overview}
\label{\detokenize{design/project-plan:overview}}\label{\detokenize{design/project-plan::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Fountain View Hall wants a program that tracks event attendance and projected revenue
for multiple bookings.


\subsection{Program Requirements}
\label{\detokenize{design/project-plan:program-requirements}}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Repeatedly prompt for event name, guest count, and estimated revenue

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Continue until the user enters “done”

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Track total events processed

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Track total guests

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Track total projected revenue

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Calculate the average guests per event

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Determine the largest event

\end{itemize}


\subsection{Business Rules}
\label{\detokenize{design/project-plan:business-rules}}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Pricing Rules
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Large events receive a discount

\end{itemize}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Operational Rules
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Every booking must include a guest count

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Booking total must be calculated before the discount is applied

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Revenue totals should be tracked

\end{itemize}

\end{itemize}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\section{Planed Technology Usage}
\label{\detokenize{design/project-plan:planed-technology-usage}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
I planned on using various technologies throughout this project some are very necessary others save time. Each technology will be categorized and described below:


\subsection{Editing/Developer Tools}
\label{\detokenize{design/project-plan:editing-developer-tools}}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxtitleref{Git} and \sphinxtitleref{GitHub} as a VCS (version control system). %
\begin{footnote}[1]\sphinxAtStartFootnote
Go to the \sphinxhref{https://github.com/dwerkjem/lab4rev2}{project repo} to see commit history.
%
\end{footnote}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxhref{https://docs.astral.sh/uv/}{uv} for package, project, and environment management.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxtitleref{lefthook} as a Git hook manager.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxtitleref{pre\sphinxhyphen{}commit} to run pre\sphinxhyphen{}commit scripts. %
\begin{footnote}[2]\sphinxAtStartFootnote
All scripts (in scripts directory) are written for unix systems and use the bash language.
%
\end{footnote}
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxtitleref{ruff} for Python linting and formatting.

\end{itemize}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxtitleref{Sphinx} to help build this beautiful documentation.

\end{itemize}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip
